description_long: This is a modern, three-seater sofa upholstered in a muted sage green fabric, featuring clean lines and a boxy silhouette. The sofa includes three large, rectangular back cushions and three seat cushions, all of which appear to be loose and uniformly sized. Four decorative throw pillows with a white and gray botanical pattern add visual interest and comfort, placed symmetrically at the corners and center. The armrests are straight, flat, and extend to the same height as the backrest, contributing to the sofa's contemporary look. The legs are short, tapered, and dark-colored, positioned at each corner for stability. The overall design is minimalist and functional, suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments.
description: A modern sage green three-seater sofa with straight armrests, loose cushions, and four patterned throw pillows. It features a clean, boxy design with short, dark tapered legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing three seat and three back cushions, four patterned throw pillows, and straight armrests.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the sofa's depth, armrest profile, and arrangement of throw pillows.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous back panel and the tops of the back cushions and pillows.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, showing the armrest, cushion depth, and pillow placement.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three loose, uniform seat cushions and three matching back cushions, with four decorative throw pillows symmetrically placed at the corners and center.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, flat armrests at seat height, boxy profile, no visible padding or decorative elements, matching the sofa's upholstery.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, tapered legs in a dark finish, positioned at each corner, slightly angled outward, with a simple, exposed design.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight backrest with three loose, rectangular cushions forming a continuous, segmented structure.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid sage green fabric with a smooth, matte texture; throw pillows feature a white and gray botanical pattern.
